author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Phase 8 scoped to MVP: tracing (capture autograd graph into IR), IR representation (IrGraph, IrNode, IrValue), optimization passes (constant folding, DCE, operator fusion), interpreter-based execution (TracedModule executes IR by dispatching to existing ops), serialization (bincode round-trip), compile() API. Deferred: Cranelift codegen, PTX backend, memory planning, kernel selection, graph breaks, export mode. The interpreter approach proves the architecture — codegen can be layered on later.
